TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cipawkan, title = Cipawkan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cipawkan} }

S.FORM: alang Cipawkan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,448 buwan, 6,662 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 1,051 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 5,611 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cipawkan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cipawkan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cipawkan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cipawkan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cipawkan hya' ga Kenuy. tay mkyahu' na Cipawkan hya' ga Cibarbaran. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Cipawkan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,448 buwan, 6,662 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 1,051 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 5,611 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cipawkan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cipawkan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cipawkan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cipawkan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cipawkan hya' ga Kenuy. tay mkyahu' na Cipawkan hya' ga Cibarbaran. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨipawkan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨipawkan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨipawkan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨipawkan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨipawkan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨipawkan ħjaʔ ɣa kenuj. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨipawkan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiβarβaran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
